  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 1820 seeks to establish a Labor Trafficking Unit in California.",
    "The Labor Trafficking Unit will investigate and prosecute perpetrators of labor trafficking.",
    "There has historically been no coordinated effort focused on labor trafficking in California.",
    "Preliminary data indicates survivors of labor trafficking in California are men and women of all ages and work in a wide range of industries.",
    "The COVID-19 pandemic has highlighted the need to protect workers and ensure safe working conditions.",
    "California has the highest number of victims of human trafficking in the US over the last two decades.",
    "The introduction of AB 1820 aims to ensure that California proactively addresses all forms of human trafficking, including labor trafficking."
  ]
